import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Navigation from '../components/Navigation'; import Footer from '../components/Footer'; const steps = [ { n:'01', title:'User describes the goal', desc:'"Merge these PDFs." "Create an invoice for Acme Corp." "Show me sales last month." Speak it. Type it. Whisper it.' }, { n:'02', title:'GBC interprets intent', desc:'The Goal-Based Computing engine understands what you want, plans the right tools, decides the workflow.' }, { n:'03', title:'GoalOS generates the UI', desc:'A minimal, task-specific interface materializes — only what is needed, nothing more.' }, { n:'04', title:'Task gets done', desc:'You complete the goal with zero learning curve. No menus to navigate. No tutorials.' }, { n:'05', title:'Interface disappears', desc:'Done. No clutter, no maintenance, no updates — it\'s gone until you need it again.' }, ]; const examples = [ { icon:'📄', say:'"Merge PDFs."', pills:['1. Upload','2. Arrange','3. Merge','4. Download'] }, { icon:'🧾', say:'"Create invoice."', pills:['1. Client info','2. Products','3. Tax','4. Generate PDF'] }, { icon:'💳', say:'"Track expenses."', pills:['1. Input','2. Categories','3. Dashboard','4. Reports'] }, ]; const keyFeatures = [ { icon:'🧠', title:'Adaptive Intelligence', desc:'GoalOS observes, remembers, and evolves with your behavior — automatically prioritizing the workflows most relevant to you. No settings. No configuration.' }, { icon:'💬', title:'Conversational Computing', desc:'"Organize my documents." "Find last month\'s report." "Show sales trends." Talk to your computer the way you talk to a colleague.' }, { icon:'🗄️', title:'Personal Knowledge Layer', desc:'A deep memory across all your activities. "What presentation did I make for XYZ client?" "Find the file with customer revenue data."' }, ]; const tableRows = [ ['TARGET USER','Anyone','Developers','Everyone'], ['INPUT','Menus & Clicks','Code & Prompts','Natural Language'], ['OUTPUT','Permanent App','Generated Code','Task Results'], ['INTERFACE','Fixed','Semi-permanent','Temporary & Disposable'], ['LEARNING CURVE','High','Medium','Zero'], ['PERSONALIZATION','None','Minimal','Deep & Continuous'], ]; const audience = [ ['01','Business Owners','Invoices, reports, dashboards — zero software knowledge.'], ['02','Students','Notes, presentations, schedules — effortlessly.'], ['03','Freelancers','Documents, clients, finances — through conversation.'], ['04','Everyday Users','Any digital task — without learning any software.'], ['05','Enterprises','Adaptive tools for non-technical staff — no training costs.'], ]; export default function GoalOS() { return (
{/* Hero */}
Product · Now in Development

GoalOS

The world's first Adaptive Goal-Driven Computing Platform.

Not an OS. Not an app builder. Not a developer tool.

A universal task-execution environment powered by AI — designed for every human, regardless of technical skill.

Join the waitlist → How it works
{/* Problem */}
The Problem

Today's model is broken.

need → find software → learn software → adapt → perform task → result

Every app has its own interface, workflow, installation, and learning curve. The user is a slave to the software — especially non-technical everyday users.

{/* How GBC Works */}
How GBC Works

Five steps. Zero learning. Infinite goals.

{steps.map((s, i) => (
{s.n}
{s.title}

{s.desc}

))}
{/* Live Examples */}
Live Examples

Say it. GoalOS builds it.

{examples.map((e, i) => (
{e.icon}

{e.say}

Generates
{e.pills.map(p => {p})}
))}
{/* Key Features */}
{keyFeatures.map((f, i) => (
{f.icon}
{f.title}

{f.desc}

))}
{/* Architecture */}
GBC Hybrid Architecture

Local speed. Cloud reasoning. Invisible orchestration.

{[{ side:'LOCAL LAYER', sub:'On your device', icon:'💻', items:['Fast, low-latency operations','Privacy-sensitive tasks stay private','Instant context retrieval'], },{ side:'CLOUD LAYER', sub:'For heavy thinking', icon:'☁️', items:['Complex multi-step reasoning','Dynamic UI generation','Advanced AI planning'], }].map((box, i) => (
{box.icon}
{box.side}

))}

GBC automatically decides which layer handles each request — you never think about it.

{/* Audience */}
Who It's For

Everyone who's ever fought with software.

{audience.map(([n, title, desc]) => (
{n}
{title}

{desc}

))}
{/* Comparison Table */}
VS. Everything Else

A new category needs a new comparison.

Factor Traditional AI App Builders GoalOS

{/* Vision */}
Today
{['Humans learn software.','Apps are permanent.','Tasks need tools.','Technology is complex.'].map(t => (

))}
With GoalOS
